title: Wayfair CFO Sees Growth Despite 'Challenged' Consumer

summary: Wayfair CFO Kate Gulliver said despite an earnings miss by the furniture seller the company feels 'great' about the growth outlook. Gulliver said Wayfiar is less focused on when 'challenged' consumers will recover, but the strength of internal initiatives that she believes will drive growth.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Treasuries Draw Buyers After Selloff as Oil Surge Stalls

summary: Treasuries rose as the recent surge in oil prices stalled and bond investors were drawn to 30-year yields that topped 5% for the first time this year.

title: 'No Signs Whatsoever' of High-End Consumer Pullback: Hyatt CEO

summary: Mark Hoplamazian, president & CEO at Hyatt Hotels Corporation, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Hyatt shares climb after the hotel operator reported adjusted earnings-per-share for the first quarter that topped analysts’ expectations. Analysts were encouraged by the update, which showed that the company’s luxury chains continue to outperform. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: A group including Ares Management Corp. provided around $800 million in a private credit deal to finance Apollo Global Management Inc.’s investment in the GoodLife Group, which operates health clubs in Canada, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: How Ketamine Spawned a $1.7 Billion J&J Blockbuster Drug
title_cn: 氯胺酮如何催生价值 17 亿美元的强生重磅药物
summary:
Spravato, the ketamine-derived nasal spray from Johnson & Johnson, was once seen as a long shot. It was difficult to deliver, heavily regulated and slow to catch on. Find out how it became a billion-dollar drug and part of a new model for treating depression.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc., whose battered stock has served as a proxy for concerns over the health of the $1.8 trillion private credit industry, will face fresh scrutiny from investors and Wall Street analysts with the release of its first-quarter earnings.  Bloomberg's David Havens joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY Pied-à-Terre Tax Needs Significant Rates to Earn $500 Million

summary: Luxury second homes in New York will have to be taxed at a “significant” amount to generate the $500 million of revenue the city is counting on to help close a gaping budget hole, according to a new study from New York City Comptroller Mark Levine’s office.

title: Iran’s New Leader Pledges to Guard Nuclear and Missile Tech
title_cn: 伊朗新领导人承诺保护核与导弹技术
summary: Iran’s new supreme leader gave a rare statement on Thursday, vowing not to give up the country’s nuclear or missile technologies and signaling Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz. Natasha Hall, Associate Fellow at Chatham House joins to discuss on Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Senate Bans Members, Staff From Trading on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 美国参议院禁止议员和工作人员在预测市场上进行交易
summary: The US Senate voted unanimously Thursday to ban its members and staff from trading on fast-growing prediction markets, highlighting concerns about insider trading on the platforms after a US soldier was accused of using classified information to profit from trades.

title: Yen Soars as Japan Intervenes After Issuing ‘Final’ Warning
title_cn: 日本发出“最终”警告后进行干预，日元飙升
summary: The yen surged as much as 3%, its biggest intraday gain in almost two years, after Japan intervened in the foreign-exchange market, hours after officials delivered a “final” warning to investors against selling the currency.

summary: Apple Inc. reported revenue for the fiscal second quarter that topped analysts’ estimates, helped by demand for the iPhone and Mac.

title: Meta Shares Plunge on Rising Concern About AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 由于对人工智能支出热潮的担忧日益加剧，Meta 股价暴跌
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. shares plunged the most in six months after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment that Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg is making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off.

title: Roblox Shares Tumble After User Numbers Fall Short
title_cn: 用户数量不足后 Roblox 股价暴跌
summary: Roblox Corp. reported first-quarter users that fell short of analysts’ expectations after implementing safety features restricting how kids, who make up a majority of its audience, can use the platform.

title: Alphabet Soars After Strong Sales Signal AI Bets Paying Off

summary: Alphabet Inc. shares soared 10% to a record after the company reported strong demand for its cloud and artificial intelligence offerings, signaling that unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure are paying off.

title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza
title_cn: Alphabet、亚马逊在人工智能领域的盈利丰厚，超过了 Meta
summary: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence. The upshot: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is seeing a clear payoff from its AI spending, while Meta Platforms Inc. is lagging behind.

title: Reddit Beats Sales Expectations Again on Continued Ads Growth
title_cn: Reddit 广告持续增长，销售再次超出预期
summary: Reddit Inc. projected sales in the current period that surpassed Wall Street estimates, continuing a streak of strong revenue growth powered by the company’s surging advertising business.

title: How Big Tech’s AI Ambitions Are Fueling a Borrowing Boom
title_cn: 大型科技公司的人工智能野心如何推动借贷热潮
summary: For the past few years, the largest US technology companies have been in a costly race to develop advanced artificial intelligence systems while at the same time providing computing power to a burgeoning field of startups. To chase these goals, they have radically changed how they finance their growth. Long reliant on rich revenues and share price increases, Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Meta Platforms Inc. and other tech giants now are borrowing heavily to build the technology that makes chatbots run

title: Musk Says No Contract Dictating His Early Donation to OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克表示，没有合同规定他对 OpenAI 的早期捐赠
summary: Elon Musk acknowledged there was no contract with OpenAI regarding the terms of his donation to the company when it was first founded as a nonprofit research organization more than a decade ago.

title: Zuckerberg, Cook Not Interested in Buying NFL’s Seattle Seahawks
title_cn: 扎克伯格和库克对收购 NFL 西雅图海鹰队不感兴趣
summary: Mark Zuckerberg and Tim Cook aren’t planning a bid for the NFL’s Seattle Seahawks.

title: News Organizations Push Back Against Web Archive Used For AI
title_cn: 新闻机构反对将网络档案用于人工智能
summary: Major news organizations, including CNN, NBC and USA Today, have joined an effort to curb the storage of their content in a web archive used by artificial intelligence companies for training chatbots.

title: Stay Away From Any IPO Until It Gets Its Footing: Forrest
title_cn: 福雷斯特：在站稳脚跟之前不要参与任何首次公开募股
summary: Kimberly Forrest, CIO and founder of Bokeh Capital Partners, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Holder 137's Stake at 1%, Tops $10 Billion Value
title_cn: SpaceX Holder 137 持股 1%，价值突破 100 亿美元
summary: Investor 137 Ventures has around $10 billion in SpaceX after writing multiple checks backing the Elon Musk-led company. Ahead of SpaceX’s IPO, Justin Fishner-Wolfson, founder and managing partner at 137 Ventures, discusses the expected windfall and two new funds the VC firm has raised to back startups and founders staying private longer. He speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citadel Securities’ Rubner Sees Tech Selloff as Buying Opportunity
title_cn: Citadel 证券的鲁布纳将科技股抛售视为买入机会
summary: Scott Rubner, head of equity and equity derivatives strategy at Citadel Securities, says he is not seeing a decline in AI spending and demand. He discusses the buying opportunity he sees in US megacap tech stocks and why he’s bullish on consumer trading. Rubner speaks with Dani Burger on the sidelines of Bloomberg House Miami. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Audio Industry Is Grappling with the Rise of ‘Podslop’
title_cn: 音频行业正在努力应对“Podslop”的兴起
summary: Over the past nine days, 39% of new podcasts were likely AI-generated, according to the Podcast Index.

title: AI Debt Investors Show Signs of Fatigue After $300 Billion Binge
title_cn: AI 债务投资者在 3000 亿美元的狂欢之后表现出疲倦的迹象
summary: After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue.

title: Qualcomm CEO Teases Deal with Large Hyperscaler
title_cn: 高通首席执行官调侃与大型超大规模企业的交易
summary: Qualcomm shares surged after the company said it was making headway in the lucrative data center market and teased a partnership with a large hyperscaler. Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Needs to Stop Spending As If It's A Cloud Giant: Lee
title_cn: Meta 需要停止像云巨头一样的支出：Lee
summary:
Dave Lee from Bloomberg Opinion critiques Meta's positioning as a cloud business, highlighting that unlike true hyperscalers such as Amazon and Google, Meta does not demonstrate healthy growth in cloud sales driven by AI. Despite Meta's substantial capital expenditure of up to $145 billion, its AI strategy appears unconvincing, as reflected in the cautious tone of its leadership during the earnings call. Lee emphasizes that Meta's cloud investments do not translate into the same growth metrics seen in established cloud providers, suggesting the company should reconsider its spending approach in this area.

Original filename: 20260430_164535_Bloomberg_Opinion_Meta_s_Cloud_Spending_Lacks_Conviction_Am.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Weighs Funding Offers at Over $900 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Anthropic 的融资报价估值超过 9000 亿美元
summary: Anthropic has begun weighing a fresh funding round that would value the AI developer at more than $900 billion, according to sources, potentially overtaking longtime rival OpenAI as the world's most valuable AI startup. Bloomberg’s Natasha Mascarenhas joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Earnings Become Sideshow With New CEO Ready to Grab Reins
title_cn: 苹果财报成为杂耍，新任首席执行官准备掌权
summary: Apple Inc. reports quarterly earnings after the close on Thursday, but investors will be largely looking past the numbers and seeking clues to incoming Chief Executive Officer John Ternus’ strategic plans.

title: SpaceX Investor 137 Ventures Sees Stake Top 1%, Pass $10 Billion
title_cn: SpaceX 投资者 137 Ventures 持股前 1%，投资额超过 100 亿美元
summary: 137 Ventures, a repeat investor in Elon Musk’s SpaceX, now owns more than 1% of the company with a stake in excess of $10 billion.

title: Why Anthropic’s Mythos Is Sparking Global Alarm
title_cn: 为什么 Anthropic 的神话引发全球警报
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant released Mythos to a limited number of carefully chosen parties because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: The AI Boom Is Cushioning the US Economy From Iran War Impact
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣正在缓解美国经济免受伊朗战争影响的影响
summary: The AI growth engine was on full display in the first quarter, powering the US economy through fresh headwinds from a war-driven surge in inflation.

title: OpenAI, Meta Targeted in AI Child Safety Bill Senate Panel Backs
title_cn: OpenAI、Meta 成为人工智能儿童安全法案参议院小组支持的目标
summary: A powerful Senate committee backed legislation to require OpenAI, Meta Platforms Inc. and other artificial intelligence companies to stop minors from using chatbots, responding to a strengthening public backlash against harm to children and teenagers attributed to the fast-spreading technology.

title: Euro-Area Finance Chiefs to Discuss Mythos as Concerns Mount
title_cn: 随着担忧加剧，欧元区财长将讨论神话
summary: Euro-area finance ministers will discuss the challenges that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos AI model poses as officials struggle to get clarity on the new tool’s powers.

title: White House AI Memo Hits Issues in Anthropic-Pentagon Feud
title_cn: 白宫人工智能备忘录触及人类与五角大楼不和的问题
summary: White House officials are preparing a wide-ranging artificial intelligence policy memo that outlines requirements for AI deployment by national security agencies, some of which address the issues driving a bitter dispute between the Pentagon and Anthropic PBC over military use of the firm’s technology, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Orlando Bravo on Private Markets, AI
title_cn: Orlando Bravo 谈私人市场、人工智能
summary: Orlando Bravo, Founder & Managing Partner, Thoma Bravo discusses private market strategy and AI-driven value shifts with Bloomberg’s Dani Burger at Bloomberg House Miami 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Signs Legislation Ending Shutdown at Homeland Security
title_cn: 特朗普签署立法结束国土安全部关闭
summary: The longest partial shutdown in US history ended Thursday after the House passed funding for most of the Homeland Security Department, just days ahead of missed paychecks for Transportation Security Administration workers that threatened to throw airports into chaos for a second time this year.

title: Trump Says US Removing Scotch Tariffs After UK King’s Visit
title_cn: 特朗普表示英国国王访问后美国将取消苏格兰威士忌关税
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would be removing some whiskey tariffs following a visit from King Charles III, a move that delivers a major trade concession to the UK.

title: Trump’s Next Attorney General Likely Will Be One of These Three
title_cn: 特朗普的下一任司法部长可能会是这三人之一
summary: Acting AG Todd Blanche is considered the frontrunner for the job.

title: Trump Says He Is Lifting Some Scotch Tariffs
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将取消部分苏格兰威士忌关税
summary: President Donald Trump said he would be removing some whiskey tariffs following a visit from King Charles III during remarks to reporters at the White House.

title: Trump Says He’s Open to Reducing US Troops in Spain, Italy
title_cn: 特朗普表示他对减少驻西班牙和意大利的美军持开放态度
summary: President Donald Trump indicated he was open to drawing down American military personnel from other NATO members a day after saying he was reviewing US troop levels in Germany.

title: S&P Hits Records, Wayfair Earnings Miss | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/30/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔创历史新高，Wayfair 盈利未达预期彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: On today's episode on Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Mary Ann Bartels, Sanctuary Wealth Chief Investment Strategist about tech earnings and the S&P500 hitting a record, and  Kate Gulliver, Wayfair CFO on earnings. They also spoke with Dr. Fanny Elahi, Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai Associate Professor of Neurology and Neuroscience. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Doesn't Care If Powell Stays on Fed Board
title_cn: 特朗普表示他不在乎鲍威尔是否留在美联储董事会
summary: "I don’t care. If he stays on he stays on,” President Donald Trump says when asked about his thoughts on Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell’s decision to stay on the Fed Board of Governors after his term as chair is over. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He Doesn’t Care If Powell Remains on Fed Board
title_cn: 特朗普表示他不在乎鲍威尔是否继续留在美联储理事会
summary: President Donald Trump said he did not care if the Federal Reserve’s Jay Powell remained as a governor after his tenure as the central bank’s chair ends.

title: American Flight Heads to Caracas as Commercial Flights to Venezuela Resume
title_cn: 随着飞往委内瑞拉的商业航班恢复，美国航班飞往加拉加斯
summary: American Airlines Group Inc. resumed flights to Venezuela after a seven-year hiatus, as President Donald Trump pushes to restore commercial and diplomatic ties after ordering the capture of President Nicolas Maduro.

title: Trump Signs Permit for Pipeline from Canada Echoing Keystone XL
title_cn: 特朗普签署加拿大管道许可证，呼应 Keystone XL
summary: US President Donald Trump on Thursday signed a presidential permit authorizing Bridger Pipeline’s project meant to carry Canadian crude to Wyoming — the latest in years of back-and-forth over oil pipelines linking the countries.

title: Trump Says Iran Blockade Working as Oil Briefly Hits War’s High
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗封锁在石油短暂触及战争高点之际发挥作用
summary: President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports even as oil prices hit a wartime high amid concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon.

title: Trump Signs Order Expanding Access to Retirement Plans
title_cn: 特朗普签署命令扩大退休计划范围
summary: President Donald Trump says that every American will be able to open a new low-cost IRA account at TrumpIRA.gov, and low-income Americans will be eligible to receive up to $1,000 per year in matching funds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Nominates Saphier for Surgeon General, Pulls Means
title_cn: 特朗普提名萨菲尔为卫生局局长，并采取措施
summary: President Donald Trump pulled the nomination of wellness entrepreneur Casey Means to be US surgeon general and named Nicole Saphier, a radiologist, to replace her.

title: Trump Signs Executive Order to Expand Access to Retirement Plans
title_cn: 特朗普签署行政命令以扩大退休计划的覆盖范围
summary: President Donald Trump signed an executive order aimed at expanding access to retirement plans for workers whose employers don’t offer that benefit, seeking to refocus the administration’s messaging on economic issues.

title: House Votes to End DHS Shutdown | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/30/2026
title_cn: 众议院投票结束国土安全部关闭|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses the House vote to end the longest partial government shutdown in US history and provide funding to most of the Department of Homeland Security. On today's show, Republican Senator Steve Daines from Montana, Founder and CEO of Echo Canyon Consulting Jon Seaton, Former Special Assistant to President Biden and Democratic Strategist Meghan Hays, and Chatham House Associate Fellow Natasha Hall (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Names Vietnam as ‘Priority’ Nation on IP Rights Watch List
title_cn: 美国将越南列入知识产权观察名单“优先”国家
summary: The US Trade Representative identified Vietnam as a top concern in a new report on intellectual property rights, in a move that could prompt a fresh trade investigation into a leading trading partner.

title: Brazil Congress Shortens Bolsonaro Sentence in Defeat for Lula
title_cn: 巴西国会因卢拉失败而缩短博尔索纳罗的刑期
summary: Brazilian lawmakers voted to override President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s veto of a bill to reduce Jair Bolsonaro’s prison sentence, dealing another major blow to the leftist leader ahead of his reelection bid this year.

title: Hegseth Calls Anthropic CEO a ‘Lunatic,’ Defends Pentagon AI Use
title_cn: Hegseth 称 Anthropic 首席执行官为“疯子”，为五角大楼人工智能的使用辩护
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said the US doesn’t let artificial intelligence make lethal targeting decisions even as he called Anthropic PBC Chief Executive Officer Dario Amodei an “ideological lunatic” after a recent spat over military use of the company’s chatbot.

title: FDA Panel Votes Against AstraZeneca’s Breast Cancer Drug
title_cn: FDA 小组投票反对阿斯利康的乳腺癌药物
summary: AstraZeneca Plc failed to persuade a US regulatory review panel about the benefits of its novel breast cancer medicine, creating a hurdle for one of the key drugs in the company’s pipeline.

title: Hegseth Battles Democrats Over Iran War at 60-Day Mark
title_cn: 赫格斯与民主党就伊朗战争六十天大胜进行斗争
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s second day of testimony before Congress provided Democrats an opportunity to criticize the Trump administration over the Iran war, with lawmakers casting the conflict as illegal, unpopular and ill-defined.

title: Trump Says Tennessee to Redraw District Maps to Boost GOP
title_cn: 特朗普称田纳西州将重新绘制选区地图以提振共和党
summary: President Donald Trump said Tennessee will redraw its House congressional map following a key Supreme Court decision Wednesday, a move expected to bolster Republicans ahead of what are forecast to be tough midterm elections in November.

title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Vows to ‘Guard’ Nuclear Tech
title_cn: 伊朗新任最高领导人誓言“守护”核技术
summary: Iran’s new supreme leader pledged to not give up the country’s nuclear or missile technologies in a rare statement on Thursday and signaled Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Saphier for Surgeon General After Pulling Means Nomination
title_cn: 特朗普在撤回提名后任命萨菲尔为卫生局局长
summary: President Donald Trump named Nicole Saphier, a radiologist to be US surgeon general after pulling the nomination of wellness entrepreneur Casey Means. The reversal is the second time Trump has withdrawn a pick for role of the nation’s top doctor. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Populist Anger Fuels US ‘Tax the Rich’ Movement
title_cn: 民粹主义愤怒如何助长美国“向富人征税”运动
summary: In March, Washington state passed the first income tax in the state’s history, a 9.9% levy on personal income exceeding $1 million annually. Washington is one of five states led by a Democratic governor that have increased income taxes on the wealthy in the past five years. Several more are considering following suit.

title: ICE Misconduct in Chicago Enabled by Trump Officials, State Says
title_cn: 州政府称，特朗普官员在芝加哥实施 ICE 不当行为
summary: Trump administration officials enabled misconduct by federal immigration and border patrol agents as part of an enforcement crackdown last year in Chicago, which led to mass raids, many arrests and some violent conflicts with protesters, according to an Illinois state investigation.

title: Nigerian Court Clears Path for Unified-Opposition Vote Challenge
title_cn: 尼日利亚法院为统一反对派投票挑战扫清道路
summary: Nigeria’s Supreme Court overturned a ruling that could have derailed the nation’s major opposition party ahead of national elections in 2027.

title: Myanmar Junta Moves Ex-Leader Aung San Suu Kyi to House Arrest
title_cn: 缅甸军政府将前领导人昂山素季软禁
summary: Myanmar’s military-backed government announced Thursday that Aung San Suu Kyi will be moved to house arrest from Naypyidaw Prison to serve her remaining prison term, a conciliatory gesture a few days ahead of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations Summit in the Philippines as the regime seeks international recognition.
